title: How to Capture screenshots and attach them to monday.com tasks?

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Monday Community!

We’ve got a simple solution for adding screenshots directly to your monday.com tasks — no extra tabs or copy-pasting needed!

Meet: Capture for monday.com

This is a tool from SaaSJet — a Chrome extension + monday.com app — that lets you:

  • Take screenshots, annotate them (arrows, highlights, text) and instantly attach them to a task.

  • Automatically generate task descriptions or apply templates for repetitive tasks.

  • Use “Create Similar” to quickly create multiple tasks based on the same template.

  • Save unfinished drafts and restore them later if you lose focus.

⚠ To use Capture, you must have two extensions installed:

  • monday.com account with the Capture for monday.com app installed.

  • Capture in Chrome for monday.com and Jira extension from the Chrome Web Store.

Step 1 – Install the App in monday.com

First, we will install the app from the monday.com Marketplace

  1. Inside monday.com, open monday Marketplace.

  2. In the search bar, type “Capture for monday.com”.

  3. Find an app

  4. Click Install app.

Step 2 – Choose Workspaces

  • Select All Workspaces to make it available everywhere.

  • Or choose Specific Workspaces if you want to limit where it’s used.

  • Click Install.

  • If you chose to add Capture to all workspaces, you will then need to select the initial workspace and click the Add App button.

Step 3 – Install the Chrome Extension

Before you can create tasks directly from your browser, you’ll need the extension:

  1. Go to Chrome Web Store

  • Open Chrome Web Store.

  • Search for “Capture in Chrome for monday.com”

2. Add to Chrome

  • Click the extension name to open its page.

  • Press Add to Chrome.

  1. Pin the Extension

  • Click the puzzle icon in Chrome’s top bar.

  • Pin the Snap Send for monday.com icon so it’s always easy to access.

Step 4 – Launch the Extension & Select monday.com

  1. Click the extension icon in your toolbar.

  2. On the welcome screen, choose monday.com (you can also use it with Jira if needed).

Step 5 – Connect the Extension to monday.com

    1. If the Capture for monday.com app is already installed:

    2. Click Connect to monday.com.

  2. If not installed yet:

    • Click Install app in the extension pop-up – this will take you to monday.com marketplace.

  • After that, click the Authorize button to give the requested permissions, including reading boards, workspaces, and profile information, as well as posting updates and other necessary actions for the app to function properly.

Step 6 – You’re All Set!

Once connected, you’ll see the “You’re all set!” confirmation screen.

Now you can:

  • Screen capture with annotation – take instant screenshots and highlight important details.

  • Annotate design feedback – mark up UI elements, point out issues, or suggest improvements visually.

  • Send annotated screenshots directly into monday.com boards as tasks with Task Creator for monday.com.

  • Use this powerful screenshot tool with markup to streamline bug reporting, feedback collection, and creative reviews.

Got questions or feedback?
Drop a message at support@saasjet.com or in comments.

You can read more about the app’s features and use cases on our website.
